metadata.description: Workflow YAML creator plugin for jobworkerp-rs Custom Serverless Workflow DSL v1.0.0

plugins.name: jobworkerp-workflow
plugins.description: Create and edit workflow YAML compliant with jobworkerp-rs Custom Serverless Workflow DSL v1.0.0. Supports built-in runners, MCP servers, plugin runners, flow control, and jq/Liquid runtime expressions.
